---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for LunoPeak
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? Is your feature request related to a problem?
Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented.

## Alternative Solutions
Have you considered any alternative solutions or features?

## Use Case
Describe how you would use this feature in your workflow.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Affected Views
Which view(s) would this feature apply to?
- [ ] Dashboard / Overview
- [ ] Live / Sessions / Transcripts
- [ ] Costs / Tools
- [ ] Repos / Work Graph / Timeline / Diffs / Repo Pulse
- [ ] Setup / Skills / Agents / Memory / Hooks
- [ ] Hygiene / Lint / Deps / Env / Ports
- [ ] Snapshots / Worktrees
- [ ] Assistant
- [ ] Settings
- [ ] All views
